title: Preview Lock Command Grid
concept: A dense power-user command deck that keeps the live WordPress preview locked as the dominant workspace while readable command tiles expose Blueprint runs, runtime Save & Reload, save destinations, launch routes, Site Manager tools, saved management, and transfer history.
focus: dense command grid with readable keyboard-like affordances
flows: Select a representative Blueprint from the honestly labeled 6 of 43 gallery subset, inspect JSON, validate it, confirm replacement, run progress, and update the live preview, path, database size, title, and transfer history
Change WordPress, PHP, language, older version, network, and multisite settings, show the unsaved reset warning, auto-save when needed, run Save & Reload, and update the runtime badge

Save the current temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with destination-specific consequences, file-copy progress, saved identity, saved row insertion, and reset versus reload behavior
Start or replace through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and .zip import with their real inputs and constraints visible
Use Site Manager Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, and Settings controls beside the protected preview, including file dirty/save state and database tool results
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, rename, delete confirmation, row removal, and active temporary fallback
Use portability actions for GitHub export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle copy/download with command history results
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview input
Gutenberg PR or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token warning
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser, validation, and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset labeled as 6 of 43
Featured Blueprint entries including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save in this browser with file-copy progress and slug identity
Save to a local directory with folder permission and reconnect consequence
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Open, rename, delete confirmation, confirmed delete, row removal, and temporary fallback
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory storage distinctions
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite controls
Destructive temporary reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with URL, validation, copy link, download bundle, replacement confirmation, run progress, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic notice states
Export to GitHub with completion state
Download active Playground as .zip
Database download
Command history and transfer ledger for saves, Blueprint runs, imports, exports, downloads, deletes, settings reloads, and navigation
